gist.headline: Time travel in the Greenhouse
gist.blurb: TimeMachine Chat just landed in the community showcase. It consolidates your tech essentials into one secure chat experience, which is much safer than actual time travel.
gist.summary: Added TimeMachine Chat to the community apps directory, featuring a unified and secure chat interface for tech essentials.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore TimeMachine Chat directly from the Pollinations Greenhouse showcase.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee interacting with a retro time machine or clock device inside a lush greenhouse filled with code-plants, representing the new TimeMachine Chat app in the Greenhouse.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny steampunk goggles, hovering next to a glowing retro time machine clock inside a lush greenhouse. Code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny steampunk goggles, hovering next to a glowing retro time machine clock inside a lush greenhouse.
